src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/Web.general_idea: Remove the ignoredRequestPatterns configuration from EnableCookieFilter to apply cookie filtering to all requests including REST endpoints.
Explicitly specify the toolKeys for the LTI client to ensure correct tool identification in the upgraded framework.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Remove imports for classes that are no longer referenced in the file after refactoring.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: Removed imports for SheetRepository, ComponentScan, and EnableJpaRepositories.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Clean up commented-out Spring configuration annotations that are no longer needed.
Remove large blocks of commented-out bean definitions for datasource and entity manager configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: Deleted commented-out methods for viewemDataSource, viewemEntityMgrFactory, and viewemTransactionMgr.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add @EnableWebSecurity annotation to explicitly enable Spring Security web configuration support.
Replace custom LtiAuthenticationProvider with the standard Lti13Configurer from the LTI 1.3 library to handle LTI handshakes.
Inject and use LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper for mapping LTI claims to Spring Security authorities.
Move RestSecurityConfigurationAdapter to a higher priority order and add /api/** permitAll rule.
Update AppWebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to use constants for paths and permit /error and well-known endpoints.
Simplify authorization rules in AppWebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to require BASE_USER_ROLE for all app paths.
Remove explicit CSRF disable as it is likely handled by the Lti13Configurer or default stateless configuration.
Remove explicit frame options disable as it is likely handled by the Lti13Configurer.
Remove explicit access denied page configuration, relying on defaults or Lti13Configurer.
Add /favicon.ico to the list of ignored paths in WebSecurity configuration.
Replace the deprecated LTI 1.1 authentication token class with the LTI 1.3 OIDC token class to support the newer LTI framework.
Change the controller's superclass to the new OIDC-aware controller to align with the LTI 1.3 migration.
Update all methods to use OidcTokenUtils for extracting user and system identifiers from the new token type.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: OidcTokenUtils oidcTokenUtils = new OidcTokenUtils(token); String currentUser = oidcTokenUtils.getUserLoginId();

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Introduce a new GET /launch endpoint to handle initial LTI launches and synchronize course roster data.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: @GetMapping("/launch") public String launch(Model model, SecurityContextHolderAwareRequestWrapper request) { ... }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add CourseService dependency to enable fetching course rosters during the launch process.
Add SystemUserService dependency to allow updating user records with fresh data from the LMS.
Switch from Tomcat-specific file upload exception to the standard Apache Commons FileUpload exception.
Import the specific @GetMapping annotation to support the new launch endpoint.
Replace the deprecated arrayToCommaDelimitedString with the explicit arrayToDelimitedString method.
Change the model attribute name for upload warnings from 'errors' to 'previewWarnings' for better semantic clarity.
Allow the sheetId parameter in the preview endpoint to be optional to support both new uploads and edits.
Replace deprecated Swagger 2 annotations with OpenAPI 3 annotations to align with modern API documentation standards.
Remove unused or deprecated Swagger 2 and Lombok annotations that are no longer needed or compatible with the new setup.
Add OpenAPI 3 @Operation annotation to document the GET /info endpoint.
Add OpenAPI 3 @Operation annotation to document the POST /undelete/{id} endpoint.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Replace the Spring Data REST annotation import with a custom project-specific annotation import.
Replace the Spring Data REST annotation import with a custom project-specific annotation import.
Replace the Spring Data REST annotation import with a custom project-specific annotation import to align with internal service architecture changes.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/rep.general_idea: Remove a commented-out Spring Data REST annotation that was likely left over from previous development or debugging.
Remove the commented-out @RepositoryRestResource annotation to clean up the codebase.
Remove a commented-out Spring Data REST annotation that was likely left over from previous development or debugging.
